pull-request-header: 🚀 Release proposal. **Merging this PR approves the release** — no CI path merges it (merge is the human's). After merge, run your signed-tag publish step to sign and publish the annotated tag (planwright core ships `scripts/release-publish.sh`; a bare adopter wires their own). CI never tags — publishing is human-gated and signed per your repo policy. Edit this line to name your own publish command. The version bump and release notes are below.
